title: Jones DP_41538 Mug Set | Queen Bee Keeper | H9cm x W11cm x D11cm | Pack of 2, Cream
features: UNIQUE & LOVELY DESIGN: Our white "Queen bee" & "Bee keeper" couples mug set features charming and adorable bee-themed artwork that symbolizes the perfect partnership, making it the ultimate romantic gift for your favorite couple.

HIGH-QUALITY MATERIAL: These premium 9cm x 11cm mugs are crafted from durable ceramic, ensuring long-lasting enjoyment and a satisfying beverage experience. Plus, they're dishwasher and microwave safe, making them both practical and versatile.

VERSATILE USAGE: Enjoy your favorite hot or cold drinks with your significant other or present these delightful mugs as a thoughtful gift for anniversaries, weddings, Valentine's Day, or to celebrate a new chapter in a couple's life.

ONE OF A KIND GIFT ITEM: This eye-catching set of two mugs is not only a unique relationship keepsake, but it also serves as a beautiful conversation piece that any couple can proudly display in their home.

ENHANCED PACKAGING: We take extra care in our packaging process to ensure your "Queen bee" & "Bee keeper" couples mug set arrives flawlessly. These mugs come securely packaged, making it the perfect hassle-free gift ready to impress and spread love.
description: Designed for couples these mugs would be a perfect gift for anniversaries, weddings and Valentine's Day
